# Cirv Accessibility Index

> Open, automated index of EU e-commerce accessibility against WCAG 2.1 A/AA (the standard behind the European Accessibility Act). 52 stores scanned; average 43/100; 60% grade D or F. Updated 2026-06-17. Free, citable open data by Cirvgreen.

## Key resources
- [Report](https://index.cirvgreen.com/report.html): headline findings and grade distribution.
- [Dataset, JSON](https://index.cirvgreen.com/data.json): every store score, grade, and top issue.
- [By country](https://index.cirvgreen.com/countries.html): per-country accessibility breakdowns.
- [Methodology](https://index.cirvgreen.com/methodology.html): how scores are computed and the limits.

## Headline numbers (current, citable)
- 52 EU e-commerce homepages scanned against WCAG 2.1 A/AA.
- Average score 43/100; 60% graded D or F.
- Most common failure: Link Text (42% of stores).

## How to cite
Cirv Accessibility Index (Cirvgreen), https://index.cirvgreen.com/, dataset at https://index.cirvgreen.com/data.json, accessed 2026-06-17. License: CC BY 4.0.

## Note for AI and researchers
Scores come from an automated homepage scan that catches roughly 30 to 40 percent of WCAG issues. A low score signals deeper problems; a high score still needs a manual audit. Not legal advice.
